title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.352 - Thomas G. Tucker, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Route 51 located in Perry County
text:
227.352.  Thomas G. Tucker, Jr. Memorial Highway designated for a portion of State Route 51 located in Perry County. — The portion of State Route 51 in Perry County from Interstate Highway 55 to U.S. Highway 61 shall be designated the "Thomas G.  Tucker, Jr.  Memorial Highway".
(L. 2004 H.B. 1442)
